name: workItem.executeWithTracking
description: Execute a work item with full progress tracking and automatic status updates. This high-level tool combines workItems.execute, runs.updateProgress, runs.updateStatus, and workItems.moveToColumn into a single operation with keepalive support for long-running executions.

agent_id.description: Optional agent ID override. Uses assigned agent if not provided.

notify_on_complete.description: Whether to send notification on completion
